title: Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor
tagline: Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Mahadeva Temple, popularly known as Thrikkalanjoor Sree Mahadeva Temple, is a Hindu temple.
overview.description: Mahadeva Temple, popularly known as Thrikkalanjoor Sree Mahadeva Temple, is a Hindu temple. It is 80 kilometers to the south-west of the Sabarimala temple on the Punalur-Muvattupuzha highway in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala, India. A banyan tree, flanked by an altar, is visible from a distance for any traveler on the main road, announcing the presence of the temple. A Mandapa artistically etched with magnificent mural paintings announcing the prowess of artists and artisans of yore surrounds the banyan tree.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor?
faq.a: Stays in Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahadeva Temple, Kalanjoor?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalanjoor, Kuttimannilbethel, Koodal, Nadutheri, Panampatta.
